title: If button clicked, tag 'person' in update
excerpt: Hi! We like to use the inbox more then notifications. However, we would still like to have the option to be efficient as is possible using the notification automations. So, I want to ask if this could be a new automation…

posts.author: Steven1 (Steven)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! We like to use the inbox more then notifications. However, we would still like to have the option to be efficient as is possible using the notification automations. So, I want to ask if this could be a new automation.

If button clicked, write update: “@name, could you check this item for me? Thanks!”

It is important that the tag makes the update appear in the Inbox of “Name”.

Thanks for the help!
